prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In a colorful ocean, hidden behind a coral reef, lived a shy octopus named Ollie. Ollie loved to watch the other sea creatures play and laugh together, but he was too afraid to join in. He'd curl up in a ball, wrapping his eight arms around himself, and wish that someone would come and talk to him. Ollie longed to make some friends, but every time he saw a fish or a sea turtle swimming towards him, he'd quickly change color to blend in with the rocks and hide. He felt like he was the only octopus in the ocean who didn't know how to make friends. But little did Ollie know, making friends was just a tentacle's reach away...
